description: Bank alerts, UPI payments, credit card transactions, EMI debits, mandates, refunds, EEFC inward remittances
classificationPrompt: Classify as FinancialTransaction if the email is a bank or payment alert about money movement — debits, credits, refunds, reversals, mandates, EMIs, salary credits, UPI/NEFT/IMPS/RTGS, credit card charges, or EEFC inward remittances. Includes HDFC, IDFC First, and any bank alert. Do NOT classify as FinancialTransaction if it is a platform invoice or billing statement.

mandatory.transactionType: one of: debit, credit, refund, reversal, emi, mandate, subscription
mandatory.transactionDateTime: ISO 8601 (use email date if not stated)

optional.merchant: payee or sender name as written in email
optional.cardLast4: last 4 digits of credit card if CC transaction
optional.referenceId: UPI ref, UTR, or transaction reference number
optional.activityMonth: YYYY-MM — the earning/activity month this payment is for (e.g. if email says 'February earnings' or 'Feb 2026 activity'). NA if not mentioned.
optional.networkKey: for EEFC inward credits only — one of: applovin, google_adrev, google_play, meta, apple, unity, mintegral, ironsource, yandex, voodoo. Use google_adrev for AdMob/Google Asia Pacific Pte Ltd, google_play for Google Play IAP (IndiaIdeas.com Limited). NA for non-EEFC transactions.
optional.eefcCurrency: for EEFC inward credits: always USD unless explicitly stated otherwise. NA for non-EEFC transactions.

description: Billing invoices from UA ad platforms — Google Ads, Meta/Facebook, Unity, Mintegral
classificationPrompt: Classify as UAInvoice if the email is an actual billing invoice or statement from Google Ads, Meta/Facebook Ads, Unity Ads, or Mintegral. Must show an invoice number or billing period with a total amount due. Do NOT classify payment confirmation emails or bank debit alerts as UAInvoice.

mandatory.platform: one of: google_ads, meta, unity, mintegral
mandatory.totalAmount: total invoice amount as a number

optional.igstAmount: IGST or tax amount (for INR invoices under reverse charge)
